# Archetype: GenomicAnalyzer

*Auto-generated from `tools/archetypes/assignments.mjs` and `catalog/catalog.json`.*

**Seed archetype** (PRD §5.2).

**Workload.** Bio sequence storage + variant calling + biomarker scoring.

**Why this archetype.** rvDNA exists in npm packages and examples/dna; minimal Rust crate footprint. Risk: largely demo-stage. Demote to recipe if M4 v0.2 confirms no production crate.

> ⚠ Risk: `demo-stage-only`

Headline: ✅ exposed at SDK top-level.
